name: Robe of the Mad Scientist
description: Notes This robe lowers MP cost by 15%. This allows for more ability uses than all robes except for the Tlatoani’s Shroud, although it can beat the Shroud during prolonged, sustained MP usage with a high-level magic healing pet. It is valuable as a support robe, allowing classes like Priests and Bards to use their abilities more often.
effects: Scientist’s Expertise: Reduces the Magic casting cost of your ability by 15%
